request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent attacks show we need to give our agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. Some worry about civil liberties, but look at the facts: when we gave agencies more authority in 2022, attacks dropped 15% without any major abuses. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
